programme.title: Cat Cafe
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat cafe.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: Puppy!
programme.desc: Naomi is overjoyed with her new puppy-until it mysteriously vanishes before her friends Carol and Jessi arrive. Convinced it's been stolen, she accuses everyone, but nothing adds up. Did someone really take the puppy, or is there more to the story?

programme.title: Yoko's Computer Game
programme.desc: Yoko gets the kids to appreciate nature by tricking them into thinking the park is actually a computer game!

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: Kitchen Chemistry
programme.desc: There's a whole laboratory waiting to be explored in your kitchen. In this episode host Steve Spangler reveals how we can make crazy creations such as soap souffle and elephant toothpaste out of ordinary stuff from the supermarket.

programme.title: And the Winner Is
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have spent four weeks at Vet School, and it's time to go home. Now they all have a chance to do one last check-up on their grateful patients and say goodbye. But which one of the kids has impressed Paul enough to take the title of Head Vet?

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: The Midnight Ninja Mystery
programme.desc: When it appears that a midnight vandal is damaging Max's entry in the town's “Most Beautiful Public Garden” project, Addison goes undercover ninja to save the day.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: Seashell
programme.desc: Bring the beach closer to you with these DIY activities!

programme.title: The Missing Glasses
programme.desc: Sprinter and Leo are helping Bumble to find her glasses. They try to remember where and when she last wore them. That journey leads to several reunions with Sprinter's arch-enemies.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery find a sick crayfish and try to find him a new home with clean water before it's too late.

programme.title: Trip to Brazil
programme.desc: When Zoe and Milo argue-Zoe wants to do karate while Milo prefers dancing-Alim suggests combining both. Seeing their hesitation, he takes them to Brazil to meet Joao, their correspondent, who introduces them to capoeira, a 'combat dance' created by enslaved people.

programme.title: S'no Trouble
programme.desc: When Fico can't yodel down an avalanche of snow from the clubhouse roof, Doki wonders what does cause avalanches? Luckily, it's time for their ski trip to Innsbruck, Austria. The team must find a way to start a real, controlled avalanche, to make things safe again!

programme.title: Pilou the Kitten Sitter
programme.desc: Granny Pina is out and Lampo, Milady and Meatball are all busy for the day. Pilou goes for a walk with her doll Kelly. Back home, however, she realizes her doll is missing and there's a kitten in her stroller instead!

programme.title: Ebb and the Bike
programme.desc: Flo has a new bike and seems to prefer the bike to Ebb and Bird. But Ebb is wrong. Flo has found an Ebb sized basket to fit on the front of her bike. And there's room behind for Bird too. Now all three can ride together. Nothing Can Stop Them Now!

programme.title: Fairy Tale Wedding
programme.desc: Doctor LeFrog teaches potions at Regal Academy, but Rose's mishaps lead to exploding potions. Vicky tricks Hawk into summoning a troll, who wants to woo princesses. Rose, Joy, Hawk, Astoria, and Travis team up to protect the academy's princesses from the gross troll.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: S'no Trouble
programme.desc: When Fico can't yodel down an avalanche of snow from the clubhouse roof, Doki wonders what does cause avalanches? Luckily, it's time for their ski trip to Innsbruck, Austria. The team must find a way to start a real, controlled avalanche, to make things safe again!

programme.title: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Pittsburgh exploration: Andy Warhol Museum, thrilling cave rappel outside the city, city hotspots with local teens, and metal bracelet crafting with a local artist. A diverse week of art, adventure, and creativity with Nicole in western Pennsylvania!

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery find a sick crayfish and try to find him a new home with clean water before it's too late.

programme.title: Magnificent Mucus
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the power of mighty mucus in keeping bacteria and air particles out of your airways. In the emergency department, Maisie has a bead stuck up her nose!

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: Doki and Ducki
programme.desc: Doki stumbles upon a newly hatched duckling. To Doki's surprise, the duckling follows him! It seems like ‘Ducki' has mistakenly imprinted on Doki and thinks he's his mama! To set things right, half the team heads off to search lake Weewannanoh for the mother.

programme.title: Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed that a kite in geometry looks a lot like a kite in the sky? It's no coincidence. In this episode we join Eric on a high-flying mission to unfurl the secret of symmetry used to make kites fly. Is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Surf's up in Kiwifruit Valley, and Newts is determined to learn to surf like Heni. But one day the waves are huge and the next day they're gone and the kids have to figure out why.

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

E1 - A Barnyard Boogie with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready for a barnyard boogie with JJ & his friends! The dance party kicks off on the farm with a fun rendition of the 'Yes, Yes Vegetable Song,' where all the animals come to dance. Then, it's time to wake up the little bunny friends with a merry tune & hop, march & skip around! Join the fun as the kids sing 'Old Macdonald,' ride a little green tractor to find their animal pals & search for five little ducks all over the farm. It's a day full of singing, dancing & farm fun!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's a big day of trouble, all thanks to Orphle! First, he uses a Multicolour Cloner to make different colored clones of himself, & it's up to Mila & Morphle to track them all down before they cause too much chaos. Then, when the friends are playing in a cardboard castle, Orphle mistakenly thinks they don't want to play with him & attacks it! From stealing a treasure map to teaming up with Winston, Orphle is causing trouble all day!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: The Great Nature 'Southern Africa'
programme.desc: Experience marvelous nature that you have never seen before. This program introduces ultimate forms of ‘great nature' including ground, ocean, and natural phenomena of the earth that existed from 4.6 billion years ago.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: When Nobunaga learns that Nagamasa has defected to the Asakura side, he flies into a rage. However, thanks to Tokichiro's quick thinking, he regains his composure and decides to retreat. Tokichiro serves as the rear guard, while Koichiro takes on the most dangerous role in the retreat. Thus begins a desperate withdrawal fought by the two brothers. Meanwhile in Kyoto, Yoshiaki (Onoe Ukon), having learned of Nagamasa's betrayal, reaches a grave decision of his own.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E74
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Deewana
programme.desc: Newlywed Kajal's husband Ravi is killed by his enemies. She moves to the city and marries again, but her happiness is jinxed when Ravi returns. Release Year: 1992 Director: Raj Kanwar Awards: 1993 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Music Direction- Nadeem Saifi, Shravan Rathod, 1993 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Lyricist- Sameer, 1993 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Playback Singer- Kumar Sanu, 1993 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Debut Actor- Shah Rukh Khan

The appointment of Kapil Dev as the captain of the Indian national cricket team causes an uproar. All odds are against him when the squad faces a losing streak in the 1983 World Cup. Release Year: 2021 Director: Kabir Khan Awards: 2021 Winner Special Award - Best Movie of the Year Kabir Khan, 2022 Nominee Nickelodeon Kids' Choice Award - Favorite Movie, 2022 Nominee Asian Academy Creative Award - Best Feature Film, 2022 Winner IFF Award - Best Film

programme.title: Make Your Marc Season 3
programme.desc: The show highlights the Filipino game changers who have made an impact in their careers and profession. The program will share heartfelt stories and showcase their struggles and successes. These are the Filipino trail blazers that have ultimately ‘made their marc' in the community.

programme.title: Reporter's Notebook
programme.desc: Features stories culled from the reporters' own files, news that people did not see on the news programs. The show is written and hosted by the network's aggressive young reporters and hosted by the network.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E4 - All Fired Up
programme.desc: Paname pays tribute to the Paris firefighters, as well as to fire and flames in all their forms.

programme.title: E4 - Holding One's Breath With Champion Marine Simonis
programme.desc: At the heart of the Transatlantic Crayer Street Evening event, an evening on Crayer Street, in Ixelles, which turns into an open-air museum. Also: a meeting with freediver Marine Simonis; the celebration of the Wallonia-Brussels Federation in Paris; a 100% Belgian and 100% organic vineyard.

programme.title: E95
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E9 - Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: E7 - Trolley Dash
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E19 - Pizza Girls

programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E149
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An angry defendant flips off the judge during a virtual hearing; a victim is cross-examined by her accused attacker; and more.

programme.title: E5 - Staircase Shooter Or Defensive Dad?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: E4 - High Stakes
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: A brave grandma fights off two carjackers intent on stealing her truck; a woman stands up against heinous domestic violence; two assailants pull a gun on a store manager who escapes.

programme.title: E2 - Patrick De La Cerde
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead at his doorstep on the night he planned to propose, detectives follow a trail of obsession and jealousy that leads to a dangerous ex-lover.

programme.title: Cleansing Kalijodo
programme.desc: Kalijodo is a gang-controlled slum. When a gang leader's brother is killed, the slum erupts into violence and it is up to the new captain to restore order and break the gangs' hold on the district.

programme.title: E2 - Parents Gone Bad
programme.desc: Stories of mothers and fathers who made headlines by committing crimes out of malice, extremism, and desperation.

programme.title: E1 - Destiny (Part A)
programme.desc: Since early childhood, living in a cluttered home is all that Destiny has ever known. In 2004 tragedy struck the family when a car accident took the lives of Destiny's sister and nephew.

programme.title: E1 - Zachary Wester
programme.desc: Zachary Wester, a sheriff's deputy from Jackson County, Florida, stands accused of planting drugs on unsuspecting motorists during routine traffic stops. He's been charged with over 65 counts.

programme.title: E2 - Patrick De La Cerde
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead at his doorstep on the night he planned to propose, detectives follow a trail of obsession and jealousy that leads to a dangerous ex-lover.

programme.title: E2 - Patrick De La Cerde
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead at his doorstep on the night he planned to propose, detectives follow a trail of obsession and jealousy that leads to a dangerous ex-lover.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E4 - Episode 4
programme.desc: When a baby mink is abandoned in a store, the team gets to work on some behavioural training. But will this sweet little one be tough enough for the wild when they’re done? Visit with a mange-afflicted coyote who’s enjoying some alone time to heal.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age
programme.desc: If the tiny Nsefu pride is to survive, the teen Misfit and his older brother must quickly perfect their hunting skills. Trek into enemy territory as the lions face dominant rivals and a powerful hyena clan in the search for prey.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E4 - Episode 4
programme.desc: When a baby mink is abandoned in a store, the team gets to work on some behavioural training. But will this sweet little one be tough enough for the wild when they’re done? Visit with a mange-afflicted coyote who’s enjoying some alone time to heal.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age
programme.desc: If the tiny Nsefu pride is to survive, the teen Misfit and his older brother must quickly perfect their hunting skills. Trek into enemy territory as the lions face dominant rivals and a powerful hyena clan in the search for prey.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: E203 - Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: E203 - Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E212 - Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: E205 - Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E522 - Pups Rescue Thanksgiving / Pups Save A Windy Bay
programme.desc: The bouncy turkey from the Thanksgiving feast at City Hall has flown away with Humdinger and his kittens! // A super-strong wind has suddenly swept up all the surfers in the Adventure Bay Windsurfing Race.

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: E733 - George's New Clothes
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbit's clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes.

programme.title: E902 - Pit Crew Power
programme.desc: Blaze is racing in the Pit Stop Power Race with AJ and Gabby as his pit crew! But Crusher is also in the race, and with his Pickle Pit Crew he's determined to win. Will Blaze take home the trophy, or will Crusher pit-stop Blaze in his tracks?

programme.title: E301 - Pups Find A Genie / Pups Save A Tightrope Walker
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old brass Jack in the Box, with a genie inside who grants him three wishes! // Francois Turbot is bravely walking a tightrope, but seagulls threaten to ruin his act. Time to call the PAW Patrol!

programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E245 - Gary's Got Legs / King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. // Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: E218 - iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly’s old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly’s best friend.

programme.title: E112 - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: E119 - Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: E518 - Love Bytes
programme.desc: Things get a little buggy when Schwoz installs a new operating system on the Man Cave Computer designed to detect and eliminate threats all over Swellview.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E704 - Bye, Bye, Birthday
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E410 - Safety Worst / De-Pat-ment Store
programme.desc: After yet another Star house disaster, the fire marshal forces Patrick to watch a safety training video. // Patrick fails his way up the corporate ladder at Upturn's mall.

programme.title: E113 - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E305 - Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: E105 - Tori the Zombie

programme.desc: The Boyz take a trip to Radford Racing School in Arizona, where they learn the driving techniques they need to handle speed and power.

programme.desc: Form matches function as Bill and his team customize a 2023 Dodge Ram truck so that it can win awards while still performing like a truck.

programme.desc: Dodge challenges Eric to a grudge shootout on Woodward Avenue in Detroit. He'll compete against social media stars to build the fastest Hellcat.

programme.title: E8 - 有人歡喜有人愁？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E12 - 王牌荒島生存大賽開啟「賽車之夜」
programme.desc: 每期圍繞一個主題，邀請兩支王牌團隊，兩位隊長各帶領嘉賓進行對戰，通過才藝比拼、遊戲競技，決出王牌中的王牌；「王牌家族」沈騰、華晨宇、關曉彤、宋亞軒、沈濤已就位，歡樂派對即將開場，還有「王牌好友」楊迪、沙溢、唐嫣驚喜赴約，一起點燃快樂！

programme.title: E10 - 「情歌」專場來襲
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: Women In Asia. Guardians Of Nature
programme.desc: Their stories inspire others to connect with nature. Women who are role models, leaders, educators and campaigners are paving the way for future generations. They want to share their awareness and understanding of nature with other women, tackling the lack of inclusion and representation in all outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E10

programme.title: Inheritors

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Six Australians embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer – saltwater crocodile wrangling - and are immediately thrown in at the deep end when an emergency at the farm means they have to help separate two giant males who are up for a blue.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: E1 - Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Something is moving through Germany: machines weighing tons on wheels. In Bavaria, huge mobile cranes lift entire bridges in the middle of motorway traffic. In North Rhine-Westphalia, a heavy transport vehicle rolls through narrow villages. In Augsburg, the steel of a crane bends under 10-ton loads. Crane work with millimetre precision, overcoming obstacles on the route and constant time pressure demand the highest concentration and nerves of steel from the transport experts.

programme.desc: Jackie Chan stars as the girl-chasing private detective Ryo Saeba in this hilarious live-action adaptation of the popular Japanese manga series, City Hunter. Hired to track down the runaway daughter of a publishing tycoon, Ryo ends up on a luxury cruise ship hijacked by terrorists. With the help from his jealous assistant Carrie, undercover agent Saeko and gambler Gundam, Ryo must foil the nefarious plot.

An Abandoned Team
programme.desc: Yam Chun Kai, is a 60-year-old curmudgeon living alone. Forced into retirement, Uncle Kai reflects on his failed marriage and strained relationship with his daughter. As the hopelessness prompts him to end his life, a stray dog named Roast Piggy finds Uncle Kai and leads an animal welfare volunteer, Una Tang, to rescue him-the intelligence and humanity of Roast Piggy change Uncle Kai's attitude towards stray animals. Uncle Kai becomes friends with Una and joins her animal shelter 'Warm Home' as a volunteer, helping the abandoned animals. Una hopes Uncle Kai can take this opportunity to clear the air between him and his daughter Zoie. Just as Uncle Kai's life seems to be getting back on track, several dog poisoning incidents occur in the village he lives in...

programme.title: Seven Swords
programme.desc: In the early 1660's the Manchurians took over the sovereignty of China and established the Qing Dynasty. With many pro-nationalist revolts occurring, the newly set-up government immediately imposed a ban on the study and practice of the Martial Arts. Fire-wind, a military official from the previous dynasty, ravages and ranges across North-western China with his next goal to attack the final frontier - the intransigent and hold-out town know as the Martial Village. Fu Qinghu, a retired executioner from the previous dynasty, feels a moral obligation to try and put a stop to this brutality and decides to save Martial Village. He convinces two young people from the village to travel with him to Mount Heaven in order to seek help from Master Shadow-Glow, a hermit who is a master of swords and leads a group of disciples with unimaginable swordsmanship...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Sound Supreme Trio of Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Fish Liew, Jennifer Yu and Peter Chan Charm Man, have been invited to voice over Cantonese version of the animation film “Ne Zha 2”. This episode features these three actors sharing the joys and challenges of the dubbing process. While Fish tells that Cantonese has been a big challenge for her, Jennifer surprisingly wants to gigantify herself when asked which character's magic she would like to acquire and Peter also praises Fish even more! Let's find more fascinating behind-the-scenes stories they are going to share one by one......

programme.title: E320
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.
